first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same, focusing on the lack of professional C++ on Windows and specific financial domain experience. The minor differences in wording and the slightly more detailed critique of the C++ experience in the variant are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce new concepts or tie back to the change in location.
